allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add OSRS Tower Defense game implementation

- Implement complete tower defense game set in Lumbridge
- Add 6 enemy types with authentic OSRS creatures
- Add 3 tower types: Crossbow, Wizard, and Cannon towers
- Add comprehensive game mechanics: waves, economy, lives system
- Add pinned camera view for focused gameplay experience
- Add 3D model rendering for cannons and Duke Horacio chat head
- Add complete UI overlay with game controls and stats
- Add enemy pathfinding and tower placement system
- Add authentic OSRS styling and assets

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
